purpose: Compare AI optical/connectivity/networking peer leadership, lagging behavior, risk and migration rules.

score_formula.composite_leader_score: 25% leadership + 18% RS vs QQQ + 18% RS vs peers + 17% revenue visibility + 12% margin quality + 10% valuation comfort
score_formula.risk_adjusted_score: composite - 12% event pressure - 12% crowding risk - 12% execution risk

migration_rules.trigger: CRDO keeps RS while LITE lags.
LITE catches up with improving RS and lower risk.
migration_rules.confirmation: LITE reclaims AVWAP + peer basket improves.

migration_rules.trigger: Need lower beta AI infra exposure.
migration_rules.confirmation: ANET/AVGO strong RS and macro beta ceiling lower.
NVDA holds leadership and post-event structure.
